requirement_topic.en: NRTL Listing (UL) + Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) Permit
requirement_topic.zh: NRTL认证（UL等）及属地行政许可（AHJ许可）
requirement_topic.zht: NRTL認證（UL等）及屬地行政許可（AHJ許可）

summary.en: EV chargers (Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment, EVSE) sold or installed in the United States must bear listing or certification from a Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) recognized by OSHA under 29 CFR 1910.303. UL is the dominant NRTL for EVSE; the applicable product safety standard is UL 2594 (AC Level 2 EVSE) or UL 2202 (DC fast chargers). Beyond the product listing, installation of EVSE requires a permit from the Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) — typically the local building or electrical department — which inspects installation against the National Electrical Code (NEC, NFPA 70), particularly Article 625. AHJ requirements vary by city, county, and state; there is no single national installation permit.
summary.zh: 在美国销售或安装的电动汽车充电设备（EVSE）须取得经OSHA依据29 CFR 1910.303认可的国家认可测试实验室（NRTL）的上市认证或认可认证。UL是EVSE领域最主要的NRTL，适用的产品安全标准为UL 2594（交流二级EVSE）或UL 2202（直流快速充电器）。除产品认证外，EVSE的安装还须取得属地行政许可机构（AHJ，通常为地方建设或电气部门）颁发的许可证，该机构依据《全国电气规范》（NEC，NFPA 70）第625条对安装进行检查。AHJ要求因城市、县及州的不同而存在差异，全国范围内没有统一的安装许可。
summary.zht: 在美國銷售或安裝的電動汽車充電設備（EVSE）須取得經OSHA依據29 CFR 1910.303認可的國家認可測試實驗室（NRTL）的上市認證或認可認證。UL是EVSE領域最主要的NRTL，適用的產品安全標準為UL 2594（交流二級EVSE）或UL 2202（直流快速充電器）。除產品認證外，EVSE的安裝還須取得屬地行政許可機構（AHJ，通常為地方建設或電氣部門）頒發的許可證，該機構依據《全國電氣規範》（NEC，NFPA 70）第625條對安裝進行檢查。AHJ要求因城市、縣及州的不同而存在差異，全國範圍內沒有統一的安裝許可。

standards_or_laws: 29 CFR 1910.303 (OSHA NRTL recognition)
UL 2594 (Standard for Electric Vehicle Supply Equipment — AC Level 1/2)
UL 2202 (Standard for Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging System Equipment — DC)
NFPA 70 / NEC Article 625 (Electric Vehicle Charging System)
NEC Article 230 / 240 (service and overcurrent protection, as applied by AHJ)

summary.en: In China, EV chargers require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) administered by CNCA through designated certification bodies. The main standards are GB/T 18487.1 (AC charging system requirements) and GB/T 20234 series (connector and interface standards). CCC covers both product safety testing and factory audits. Installation is governed by GB 50054 (low-voltage electrical installations) and GB 50966 (EV charging station design code), enforced by local construction authorities — somewhat analogous to AHJ, but operating under a more unified national code framework.
summary.zh: 在中国，电动汽车充电器须通过由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）通过指定认证机构实施的中国强制认证（CCC）。主要标准包括GB/T 18487.1（交流充电系统要求）及GB/T 20234系列（接口及连接器标准）。CCC涵盖产品安全测试及工厂审查。安装方面受GB 50054（低压配电设计规范）及GB 50966（电动汽车充电站设计规范）约束，由地方建设主管部门执行——与AHJ在功能上有一定相似性，但在更为统一的全国性规范框架下运作。
summary.zht: 在中國，電動汽車充電器須通過由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）通過指定認證機構實施的中國強制認證（CCC）。主要標準包括GB/T 18487.1（交流充電系統要求）及GB/T 20234系列（接口及連接器標準）。CCC涵蓋產品安全測試及工廠審查。安裝方面受GB 50054（低壓配電設計規範）及GB 50966（電動汽車充電站設計規範）約束，由地方建設主管部門執行——與AHJ在功能上有一定相似性，但在更為統一的全國性規範框架下運作。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 (AC EV charging system)
GB 50966-2014 (EV charging station design code)
GB 50054-2011 (low-voltage electrical installation design code)
CCC certification (CNCA mandatory)

gap.en: CCC certification is not recognised in the United States and does not substitute for NRTL listing. A Chinese EVSE manufacturer must engage a US NRTL (e.g., UL, Intertek, CSA) to test and certify the product against UL 2594 or UL 2202 before it may be sold or installed in the US. In addition, each installation site requires a separate AHJ permit and inspection — a distributed, jurisdiction-by-jurisdiction process that has no direct analogue in China's more centralised code regime. The AHJ may impose additional local code amendments beyond the base NEC, which must be identified and addressed project by project.
gap.zh: CCC认证在美国不被认可，无法替代NRTL认证。中国EVSE制造商须聘请美国NRTL（如UL、Intertek、CSA）依据UL 2594或UL 2202对产品进行测试和认证，方可在美国销售或安装。此外，每个安装场地须单独取得AHJ许可证并通过检查——这是一个逐地区推进的分散流程，与中国更为集中的规范体制没有直接对应关系。AHJ还可能在NEC基础上叠加地方性规范修正条款，须逐项目识别并应对。
gap.zht: CCC認證在美國不被認可，無法取代NRTL認證。中國EVSE製造商須聘請美國NRTL（如UL、Intertek、CSA）依據UL 2594或UL 2202對產品進行測試和認證，方可在美國銷售或安裝。此外，每個安裝場地須單獨取得AHJ許可證並通過檢查——這是一個逐地區推進的分散流程，與中國更為集中的規範體制沒有直接對應關係。AHJ還可能在NEC基礎上疊加地方性規範修正條款，須逐項目識別並應對。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NRTL listing required for market access; AHJ permit required per installation site
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC) for China domestic market; installation permit required per local authority

source.publisher: U.S. Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NRTL listing (UL 2594 / UL 2202) is a hard market-access gate in the US — no NRTL mark, no lawful sale or installation. CCC does not transfer. Beyond the product mark, every installation requires a local AHJ permit; this distributed process is a recurring project cost absent from the Chinese regulatory model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NRTL认证（UL 2594 / UL 2202）是美国市场准入的硬性门槛——无NRTL标志，不得合法销售或安装。CCC认证不可转换。除产品认证外，每个安装场地均须取得地方AHJ许可证；这一分散流程是中国监管模式所没有的额外项目成本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NRTL認證（UL 2594 / UL 2202）是美國市場準入的硬性門檻——無NRTL標誌，不得合法銷售或安裝。CCC認證不可轉換。除產品認證外，每個安裝場地均須取得地方AHJ許可證；這一分散流程是中國監管模式所沒有的額外項目成本。

requirement_topic.en: NEVI Program — Uptime, OCPP Networking, Open Payment, and Buy America (Federally Funded Public Chargers)
requirement_topic.zh: NEVI计划 — 在线率、OCPP联网、开放支付及购买美国货要求（联邦资助公共充电桩）
requirement_topic.zht: NEVI計劃 — 在線率、OCPP聯網、開放支付及購買美國貨要求（聯邦資助公共充電樁）

summary.en: [UNVERIFIED — NEVI standards were under revision as of early 2025; verify current FHWA minimum standards before relying on specific figures] The National Electric Vehicle Infrastructure (NEVI) Formula Program (Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, Pub. L. 117-58, Sec. 11401) funds state EV charging networks along designated Alternative Fuel Corridors. FHWA's NEVI Minimum Standards (23 CFR Part 680) impose requirements on any charger installed with NEVI funds: (1) Hardware — minimum 4 DC fast charge (DCFC) ports per station, each capable of simultaneously delivering ≥150 kW; (2) Uptime — stations must maintain ≥97% uptime measured monthly; (3) OCPP 2.0.1 — chargers must use Open Charge Point Protocol 2.0.1 (or later) for communication with a Charging Station Management System (CSMS); (4) Open Payment — stations must accept credit/debit cards (ISO 8583 / EMV contactless) without requiring a network membership or app; (5) Buy America — iron, steel, manufactured products, and construction materials used in the project must be produced in the United States (per IIJA Sec. 70914 and FHWA Buy America requirements); (6) Cybersecurity — chargers must conform to NIST Cybersecurity Framework and OCPP security profiles. [UNVERIFIED — confirm exact Buy America waiver categories and current FHWA guidance revision date]
summary.zh: [UNVERIFIED — NEVI标准于2025年初尚在修订，依赖具体数值前请核实FHWA现行最低标准] 《基础设施投资和就业法案》（公法117-58，第11401条）设立的国家电动汽车基础设施（NEVI）公式计划为各州沿指定替代燃料走廊建设充电网络提供资金。FHWA的NEVI最低标准（23 CFR第680部分）对所有使用NEVI资金安装的充电桩规定了如下要求：（1）硬件——每站最少4个直流快速充电（DCFC）接口，每个接口须同时具备≥150kW的输出能力；（2）在线率——站点须保持月均≥97%的在线率；（3）OCPP 2.0.1——充电桩须使用开放充电协议2.0.1（或更新版本）与充电站管理系统（CSMS）通信；（4）开放支付——站点须接受信用卡/借记卡（ISO 8583 / EMV非接触式支付），不得要求用户注册会员或使用应用程序；（5）购买美国货——项目使用的钢铁、制成品及建筑材料须在美国生产（依据IIJA第70914条及FHWA购买美国货要求）；（6）网络安全——充电桩须符合NIST网络安全框架及OCPP安全档案要求。[UNVERIFIED — 请核实购买美国货豁免类别及FHWA最新指导文件修订日期]
summary.zht: [UNVERIFIED — NEVI標準於2025年初尚在修訂，依賴具體數值前請核實FHWA現行最低標準] 《基礎設施投資和就業法案》（公法117-58，第11401條）設立的國家電動汽車基礎設施（NEVI）公式計劃為各州沿指定替代燃料走廊建設充電網絡提供資金。FHWA的NEVI最低標準（23 CFR第680部分）對所有使用NEVI資金安裝的充電樁規定了如下要求：（1）硬件——每站最少4個直流快速充電（DCFC）接口，每個接口須同時具備≥150kW的輸出能力；（2）在線率——站點須保持月均≥97%的在線率；（3）OCPP 2.0.1——充電樁須使用開放充電協議2.0.1（或更新版本）與充電站管理系統（CSMS）通信；（4）開放支付——站點須接受信用卡/借記卡（ISO 8583 / EMV非接觸式支付），不得要求用戶註冊會員或使用應用程序；（5）購買美國貨——項目使用的鋼鐵、製成品及建築材料須在美國生產（依據IIJA第70914條及FHWA購買美國貨要求）；（6）網絡安全——充電樁須符合NIST網絡安全框架及OCPP安全檔案要求。[UNVERIFIED — 請核實購買美國貨豁免類別及FHWA最新指導文件修訂日期]

standards_or_laws: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (IIJA) Pub. L. 117-58, Sec. 11401 (NEVI authorization)
IIJA Sec. 70914 (Buy America for federal infrastructure)
23 CFR Part 680 (FHWA NEVI Minimum Standards) [UNVERIFIED — confirm current version]
OCPP 2.0.1 (Open Charge Point Protocol — Open Charge Alliance)
NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0
ISO 8583 / EMVCo contactless payment standards

summary.en: China has no equivalent to NEVI's Buy America requirement or its open-protocol / open-payment mandates for publicly funded chargers. Chinese public charging infrastructure is predominantly deployed by state-owned enterprises (State Grid, Southern Grid) or large private operators (TELD, StarCharge) under national plans (e.g., the 14th Five-Year Plan EV targets). Communication protocols are based on GB/T 27930 (DC) and NB/T 33025 (operator platform), which are proprietary-compatible but not identical to OCPP. Payment is typically via operator apps or WeChat/Alipay; open contactless card payment is not mandated. There is no domestic content requirement analogous to Buy America for equipment procurement.
summary.zh: 中国对于政府资助公共充电桩，没有与NEVI购买美国货要求、开放协议或开放支付强制要求相对应的法规。中国公共充电基础设施主要由国有企业（国家电网、南方电网）或大型私营运营商（特来电、星星充电）按照国家规划（如「十四五」新能源汽车目标）建设部署。通信协议基于GB/T 27930（直流）和NB/T 33025（运营商平台），兼容专有系统但与OCPP并不完全相同。支付通常通过运营商App或微信/支付宝完成，法规未强制要求开放式非接触卡支付。设备采购方面也没有类似购买美国货的国内内容要求。
summary.zht: 中國對於政府資助公共充電樁，沒有與NEVI購買美國貨要求、開放協議或開放支付強制要求相對應的法規。中國公共充電基礎設施主要由國有企業（國家電網、南方電網）或大型私營運營商（特來電、星星充電）按照國家規劃（如「十四五」新能源汽車目標）建設部署。通訊協議基於GB/T 27930（直流）和NB/T 33025（運營商平台），兼容專有系統但與OCPP並不完全相同。支付通常透過運營商App或微信/支付寶完成，法規未強制要求開放式非接觸卡支付。設備採購方面也沒有類似購買美國貨的國內內容要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2015 (DC charging communication between off-board charger and BMS)
NB/T 33025-2016 (EV charging network management system — platform communication)
14th Five-Year Plan for New Energy Vehicles (2021–2025) [UNVERIFIED — confirm document title]

gap.en: [UNVERIFIED — Buy America waiver categories and hardware assembly thresholds should be confirmed with FHWA before procurement decisions] The Buy America requirement is the single largest barrier for Chinese EVSE manufacturers seeking NEVI-funded contracts: charger hardware (enclosures, power electronics, cable assemblies) must be manufactured in the US to qualify, or a waiver must be obtained from FHWA. As of 2026, no blanket waiver exists for EV charger components sourced from China. Beyond Buy America: (1) Chinese charger firmware typically uses GB/T 27930 or proprietary protocols — migration to OCPP 2.0.1 requires firmware redevelopment; (2) Open card payment terminals (EMV contactless) are not standard on Chinese-market DCFC units; (3) 97% monthly uptime SLA requires remote monitoring and rapid field-service infrastructure absent from a fresh market entrant; (4) NIST CSF cybersecurity requirements may conflict with current firmware architectures.
gap.zh: [UNVERIFIED — 在采购决策前，应向FHWA核实购买美国货豁免类别及硬件组装门槛] 购买美国货要求是中国EVSE制造商争取NEVI资助合同面临的最大障碍：充电桩硬件（外壳、电力电子器件、线缆组件）须在美国制造方可符合要求，否则须向FHWA申请豁免。截至2026年，不存在针对中国来源电动汽车充电器零部件的一揽子豁免。除购买美国货外：（1）中国充电桩固件通常使用GB/T 27930或专有协议，迁移至OCPP 2.0.1需重新开发固件；（2）开放式EMV非接触卡支付终端并非中国市场直流快速充电产品的标准配置；（3）97%月均在线率服务水平协议要求具备远程监控和快速现场服务能力，新进市场者通常不具备；（4）NIST CSF网络安全要求可能与现有固件架构存在冲突。
gap.zht: [UNVERIFIED — 在採購決策前，應向FHWA核實購買美國貨豁免類別及硬件組裝門檻] 購買美國貨要求是中國EVSE製造商爭取NEVI資助合同面臨的最大障礙：充電樁硬件（外殼、電力電子器件、線纜組件）須在美國製造方可符合要求，否則須向FHWA申請豁免。截至2026年，不存在針對中國來源電動汽車充電器零部件的一攬子豁免。除購買美國貨外：（1）中國充電樁固件通常使用GB/T 27930或專有協議，遷移至OCPP 2.0.1需重新開發固件；（2）開放式EMV非接觸卡支付終端並非中國市場直流快速充電產品的標準配置；（3）97%月均在線率服務水平協議要求具備遠程監控和快速現場服務能力，新進市場者通常不具備；（4）NIST CSF網絡安全要求可能與現有固件架構存在衝突。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for chargers installed using NEVI federal formula funds; not mandatory for privately funded installations
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — Chinese public charging programs do not impose Buy America, open-protocol, or open-payment mandates

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — UNVERIFIED on current Buy America waiver status and 23 CFR 680 revision] NEVI Buy America is a structural barrier, not a technical one: Chinese-manufactured EVSE hardware cannot qualify for NEVI-funded deployments without either US-based manufacturing or an FHWA waiver. Additionally, OCPP 2.0.1, open payment terminals, and 97% uptime SLA are operational requirements that must be designed in — they cannot be retrofitted at the permitting stage. Verify current FHWA minimum standards and waiver guidance directly at fhwa.dot.gov before any procurement or grant application.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考 — 购买美国货豁免现状及23 CFR 680修订情况UNVERIFIED] NEVI购买美国货是结构性壁垒而非技术性壁垒：若无美国本土制造或FHWA豁免，中国制造的EVSE硬件无法符合NEVI资助部署的资格要求。此外，OCPP 2.0.1、开放支付终端及97%在线率服务水平协议是运营层面的要求，须在产品设计阶段纳入，无法在许可证申请阶段临时追加。在任何采购或补助申请前，请直接访问fhwa.dot.gov核实FHWA现行最低标准及豁免指引。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考 — 購買美國貨豁免現狀及23 CFR 680修訂情況UNVERIFIED] NEVI購買美國貨是結構性壁壘而非技術性壁壘：若無美國本土製造或FHWA豁免，中國製造的EVSE硬件無法符合NEVI資助部署的資格要求。此外，OCPP 2.0.1、開放支付終端及97%在線率服務水平協議是運營層面的要求，須在產品設計階段納入，無法在許可證申請階段臨時追加。在任何採購或補助申請前，請直接訪問fhwa.dot.gov核實FHWA現行最低標準及豁免指引。

requirement_topic.en: OCPP Networking and Utility/Site Interconnection Approval
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP联网要求及公用事业/场地接入审批
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP聯網要求及公用事業/場地接入審批

summary.en: Beyond product safety certification, US EVSE operators must navigate two further access layers: (1) Network/OCPP: Non-NEVI commercial charging networks increasingly require OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1 compliance for charger-to-CSMS communication as a de facto market standard; several states (e.g., California under CPUC/CEC programmes) mandate OCPP for grant-funded installations even outside NEVI. (2) Utility and site approval: connecting EVSE to the grid typically requires notification to or approval from the local electric utility (load study, meter upgrade, transformer capacity review). For large DCFC installations (>100 kW), a formal utility interconnection study may be required. Site approvals (building permit, fire marshal sign-off) are AHJ-dependent. In California, the CEC (California Energy Commission) administers additional incentive programmes (e.g., CALeVIP) with their own technical eligibility rules. [UNVERIFIED — state-level programme details change frequently; verify current CEC and CPUC rules at energy.ca.gov and cpuc.ca.gov]
summary.zh: 除产品安全认证外，美国EVSE运营商还须应对另外两个层面的接入要求：（1）联网/OCPP：非NEVI商业充电网络越来越多地要求充电桩与充电站管理系统（CSMS）之间采用OCPP 1.6或2.0.1通信，这已成为实际市场标准；部分州（如加利福尼亚州依据CPUC/CEC项目）即使在NEVI范围之外，也对补贴资助的安装项目强制要求采用OCPP。（2）公用事业及场地审批：将EVSE接入电网通常须向地方电力公用事业单位申报或获得其批准（负荷研究、电表升级、变压器容量审查）。对于大型直流快速充电设施（>100kW），可能须进行正式的公用事业并网研究。场地审批（建设许可证、消防部门签署）取决于AHJ的具体要求。在加利福尼亚州，加州能源委员会（CEC）还管理附加激励项目（如CALeVIP），并设有各自的技术资质要求。[UNVERIFIED — 州级项目细节变动频繁，请访问energy.ca.gov和cpuc.ca.gov核实CEC和CPUC现行规定]
summary.zht: 除產品安全認證外，美國EVSE運營商還須應對另外兩個層面的接入要求：（1）聯網/OCPP：非NEVI商業充電網絡越來越多地要求充電樁與充電站管理系統（CSMS）之間採用OCPP 1.6或2.0.1通訊，這已成為實際市場標準；部分州（如加利福尼亞州依據CPUC/CEC項目）即使在NEVI範圍之外，也對補貼資助的安裝項目強制要求採用OCPP。（2）公用事業及場地審批：將EVSE接入電網通常須向地方電力公用事業單位申報或獲得其批准（負荷研究、電表升級、變壓器容量審查）。對於大型直流快速充電設施（>100kW），可能須進行正式的公用事業並網研究。場地審批（建設許可證、消防部門簽署）取決於AHJ的具體要求。在加利福尼亞州，加州能源委員會（CEC）還管理附加激勵項目（如CALeVIP），並設有各自的技術資質要求。[UNVERIFIED — 州級項目細節變動頻繁，請訪問energy.ca.gov和cpuc.ca.gov核實CEC和CPUC現行規定]

standards_or_laws: OCPP 1.6 / 2.0.1 (Open Charge Point Protocol — Open Charge Alliance, de facto US network standard)
NFPA 70 NEC Article 625 (EVSE installation, AHJ-enforced)
IEEE 1547-2018 (Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources) [applied for larger DCFC grid connections]
California CPUC Decision 18-05-040 (EV charging programme rules) [UNVERIFIED — confirm current decision number]
California CEC CALeVIP technical eligibility requirements [UNVERIFIED — verify at energy.ca.gov]

summary.en: In China, EVSE grid connection is governed by the power grid company's own access rules (State Grid Q/GDW series standards for EV charging). Communication between chargers and the operator's cloud platform uses GB/T 27930 (DC charging) or proprietary protocols per the operator's CSMS. There is no open-protocol mandate equivalent to OCPP. Utility interconnection for EV stations is approved by the local grid company branch (similar in function to US utility interconnection review but under a single vertically integrated utility structure). Site-level permits are issued by local construction authorities under GB 50966.
summary.zh: 在中国，EVSE并网受电网企业自身接入规则约束（国家电网Q/GDW系列电动汽车充电标准）。充电桩与运营商云平台之间的通信采用GB/T 27930（直流充电）或运营商CSMS专有协议。没有相当于OCPP的开放协议强制要求。电动汽车充电站的公用事业并网由地方电网公司分支机构审批（功能上类似美国的公用事业并网审查，但在单一垂直一体化电网结构下运作）。场地级许可证由地方建设主管部门依据GB 50966颁发。
summary.zht: 在中國，EVSE並網受電網企業自身接入規則約束（國家電網Q/GDW系列電動汽車充電標準）。充電樁與運營商雲平台之間的通訊採用GB/T 27930（直流充電）或運營商CSMS專有協議。沒有相當於OCPP的開放協議強制要求。電動汽車充電站的公用事業並網由地方電網公司分支機構審批（功能上類似美國的公用事業並網審查，但在單一垂直一體化電網結構下運作）。場地級許可證由地方建設主管部門依據GB 50966頒發。

standards_or_laws: Q/GDW 1591-2014 (State Grid EV charging equipment communication protocol) [UNVERIFIED — confirm current version]
GB/T 27930-2015 (DC charging communication — off-board charger to BMS)
GB 50966-2014 (EV charging station design code)
State Grid EV charging access management rules (internal grid company standards)

gap.en: Chinese charger firmware and cloud platforms are built around GB/T 27930 and proprietary CSMS protocols — not OCPP. Entering US commercial networks (ChargePoint, Blink, EVgo, Electrify America, etc.) requires OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1 compliance, which is a firmware and backend integration gap requiring non-trivial development effort. Separately, the fragmented US utility landscape means grid interconnection approval timelines and requirements vary enormously by utility and state — Chinese manufacturers with no US deployment history will face a learning curve on load study documentation, transformer upgrade cost allocation, and utility-specific metering requirements. State incentive programmes (e.g., CEC CALeVIP, NYSERDA) add further eligibility criteria that must be tracked per-programme.
gap.zh: 中国充电桩固件和云平台围绕GB/T 27930及专有CSMS协议构建，而非OCPP。进入美国商业充电网络（ChargePoint、Blink、EVgo、Electrify America等）要求符合OCPP 1.6或2.0.1，这是固件和后端集成层面的差距，需要较大的开发工作量。此外，美国碎片化的公用事业格局意味着并网审批时间和要求因公用事业单位和州而存在巨大差异——在美国没有部署经验的中国制造商，将在负荷研究文件、变压器升级费用分摊及公用事业专有计量要求等方面面临较长的学习曲线。州级激励项目（如CEC CALeVIP、NYSERDA）还设有额外的资质标准，须逐项目跟踪。
gap.zht: 中國充電樁固件和雲平台圍繞GB/T 27930及專有CSMS協議構建，而非OCPP。進入美國商業充電網絡（ChargePoint、Blink、EVgo、Electrify America等）要求符合OCPP 1.6或2.0.1，這是固件和後端集成層面的差距，需要較大的開發工作量。此外，美國碎片化的公用事業格局意味著並網審批時間和要求因公用事業單位和州而存在巨大差異——在美國沒有部署經驗的中國製造商，將在負荷研究文件、變壓器升級費用分攤及公用事業專有計量要求等方面面臨較長的學習曲線。州級激勵項目（如CEC CALeVIP、NYSERDA）還設有額外的資質標準，須逐項目追蹤。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: de facto mandatory for US commercial network participation; mandatory for NEVI and many state-funded deployments. Utility interconnection approval: mandatory per local utility rules. State programme eligibility: programme-specific.
mandatory_status.cn: OCPP not required; grid connection governed by State Grid internal rules; no open-protocol mandate

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — UNVERIFIED on state programme details; verify at fhwa.dot.gov, energy.ca.gov, cpuc.ca.gov] OCPP 2.0.1 is the practical entry ticket for US commercial charging networks and any federally or state-funded deployment. The US utility interconnection process is fragmented and jurisdiction-specific — it is a project-management and timeline risk, not a certification gap, but must be resourced accordingly. Chinese manufacturers without OCPP-compliant firmware face both a commercial network exclusion and NEVI ineligibility simultaneously.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考 — 州级项目细节UNVERIFIED，请访问fhwa.dot.gov、energy.ca.gov、cpuc.ca.gov核实] OCPP 2.0.1是进入美国商业充电网络及任何联邦或州级资助部署项目的实际准入票据。美国公用事业并网流程碎片化且因地区而异——这是项目管理和时间线层面的风险，而非认证缺口，但须相应配置资源。不具备OCPP兼容固件的中国制造商同时面临被商业充电网络排除在外及失去NEVI资格的双重困境。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考 — 州級項目細節UNVERIFIED，請訪問fhwa.dot.gov、energy.ca.gov、cpuc.ca.gov核實] OCPP 2.0.1是進入美國商業充電網絡及任何聯邦或州級資助部署項目的實際準入票據。美國公用事業並網流程碎片化且因地區而異——這是項目管理和時間線層面的風險，而非認證缺口，但須相應配置資源。不具備OCPP兼容固件的中國製造商同時面臨被商業充電網絡排除在外及失去NEVI資格的雙重困境。
